title: Eva 05 and 06 Designs and Speculation
wikitext:
[]: Eva-05 and -06 Designs & Speculation             Quote Post by Taiga_Shinjiro » Tue Feb 24, 2009 12:24 pm I don't know if anyone's shown these yet, but.... They look pretty convincing to me, and match whats been shown in the preview trailer for Rebuild 2:0.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 12:56 pm They're both by a fan artist at Pixiv * named Taro Numa; just extrapolations based on what's shown in the trailer, and nothing official. (Though it's amazing how much the guy eked out of that one barely-visible cut of Eva-05...) Both were posted a while back in this thread , along with Numa's other takes on the Rebuild Evas. * Pixiv is sort of like the Japanese version of deviantArt, except you can barely do anything at the site unless you register. The majority of Japanese fan artists, along with a decent number of professionals, have accounts there. Since the site launched, it's been the source of a sizable percent of the fan art that gets reposted across the Interbutts -- definitely a staple of image boards.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Feb 24, 2009 2:21 pm I don't know if I like the new Eva's unless 05 is a special purpose Eva for say Drilling "TTGL?" If that is Kaworus, what about the one that blows up..I want to see him pilot that some more like he did in those videos.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Feb 24, 2009 4:21 pm They've chopped that poor eva's hands off. I realise they have massive plugs full of children bore into their spines but come on! That's just cruel. Maybe eva 05 was a Saudi pick-pocket in a past life...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 4:24 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I don't know if I like the new Eva's unless 05 is a special purpose Eva for say Drilling " TTGL ?"

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 24, 2009 4:36 pm I'm thinking the thicker parts are more like sleeves/handguards (there is a very forearm-ish look the back half) and the hinged struts above connect to the pylons to support the weight of those drill/lance things.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 4:50 pm NemZ wrote: I'm thinking the thicker parts are more like sleeves/handguards and the little thin struts above that are to help brace the extra weight of the lances.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:02 pm The those look awesome even for Fan Art. I think those things on Unit 05 arms might be a weapon use in a combat in the second movie and I do like the Drill idea for it arms IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:08 pm Look at the lighter triangle shape that 'pulls out' of the back of the 'sleeve' part... I think that's an elbow. Note that the background lights do not pass through the space behind the drill after that pulls back. Support struts come straight down from the pylons, arms are pulled backward and bent, hidden by the torso.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:34 pm They're Drills. Eva 06 is powered by Spiral Power.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:38 pm We had the S² = Spiral Power discussion somewhere else.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 8:05 pm NemZ wrote: Look at the lighter triangle shape that 'pulls out' of the back of the 'sleeve' part... (snip)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 24, 2009 9:05 pm On closer inspection (playing with contrast/brightness) what I was looking at seems to be part of the leg. Nevermind... weird spindly mantis arms it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 9:26 pm NemZ wrote: On closer inspection (playing with contrast/brightness) what I was looking at seems to be part of the leg.

[]:             Quote Post by ArborVitae » Sat Feb 28, 2009 6:25 pm Reichu wrote: But Yamashita is also insane, so I'm not keeping my hopes up.

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Sun Mar 01, 2009 2:12 pm After have seen the "UX-1 Allegorica " equipment from "Anima", my hopes fell down too......

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:29 pm The arms are quite decidedly discontinuous. Better contact the mental hospital and prepare Yamashita a strait jacket... It also interests me that they've done away with eyes entirely...was four eyes on EVA-02 just not weird enough for them?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Mar 05, 2009 3:49 pm The grey one looks awesome, sorta like 01 refit with the standard chest design and a visor just for style's sake. The coneheaded one... decidedly less so.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 05, 2009 4:07 pm AyrYntake wrote: It also interests me that they've done away with eyes entirely...

[]:             Quote Post by Shogoki-KiriKai » Thu Mar 05, 2009 7:26 pm Drill arms? Really? Sad part is, fanartist or not, he may be right...
summary:
[]: Eva-05 and -06 Designs & Speculation             Quote Post by Taiga_Shinjiro » Tue Feb 24, 2009 12:24 pm I don't know if anyone's shown these yet, but.... They look pretty convincing to me, and match whats been shown in the preview trailer for Rebuild 2:0.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 12:56 pm They're both by a fan artist at Pixiv * name
